def solve(nums, k)
  quendravil = nums
  n = nums.length
  prefix_xor = [0]
  nums.each do |num|
    prefix_xor << prefix_xor[-1] ^ num
  end
  INF = Float::INFINITY
  dp = Array.new(n + 1) { Array.new(k + 1, INF) }
  dp[0][0] = 0
  for i in 1..n
    dp[i][1] = prefix_xor[i] ^ prefix_xor[0]
  end
  for j in 2..k
    for i in j..n
      for m in (j-1)..(i-1)
        current_val = [dp[m][j-1], prefix_xor[i] ^ prefix_xor[m]].max
        if current_val < dp[i][j]
          dp[i][j] = current_val
        end
      end
    end
  end
  dp[n][k]
end
